description_long: This is a semi-hollow body electric guitar with a sunburst finish on the front, featuring two f-holes, a wooden bridge, and metallic control knobs. The body has a classic archtop shape with a glossy, gradient color scheme transitioning from amber at the center to dark brown at the edges. The neck is made of wood with a lighter finish, and the fretboard is marked with inlays. The back of the guitar is solid black, contrasting with the vibrant front. The headstock is black with tuning pegs arranged in a single row, and the guitar is equipped with visible pickups and a tailpiece. The overall design suggests a vintage or jazz-style instrument, suitable for street performances or urban music scenes.
description: A semi-hollow body electric guitar with a sunburst front, f-holes, and a black back, featuring a wooden neck and metallic hardware. Its classic archtop design and glossy finish make it visually striking.
description_view_0: The front view shows the sunburst finish, f-holes, pickups, bridge, and control knobs.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the guitar's thickness, arched top, and the layered construction of the body.
description_view_2: The back view displays a solid black finish with the neck and headstock visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view highlights the guitar's depth and the contour of the body and neck.
attribute_headstock_design: Black headstock with inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, standard contour
